releaseNotes: Added support for newer Trane Home thermostats. Added setpoint range handling from thermostat-reported limits. Added compressor speed as an optional attribute when reported by the thermostat. Added configurable driver logging levels. Updated app category for newer Hubitat releases.
author: waterboysh

apps.name: Nexia Thermostat Manager
apps.description: Parent app that discovers Trane Home / American Standard Home thermostats and creates child thermostat devices.

drivers.name: Nexia Thermostat
drivers.description: Child thermostat driver for Nexia / Trane Home thermostats.
